nasb.text: O you who dwell by many waters, Abundant in treasures, Your end has come, The measure of your end.

esv.text: O you who dwell by many waters, rich in treasures, your end has come; the thread of your life is cut.

cnv.text: 你這住在眾水旁， 多有財寶的啊！ 你的結局到了， 你被剪除的時刻到了。

ccb.text: 住在河边、拥有财宝的巴比伦人啊， 你们的结局到了， 你们的末日来了。”
